subject: Ops note: launch deployment schedule for North America | Frida Kahlo | Q4 review | INIT-0445
body: Please note the launch stream in North America has shifted to a tighter timeline. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Background context draws on methods associated with Frida Kahlo. Reference initiative INIT-0445. Maintain discretion until the kangaroo, koala, and drop bear urban encroachment assessment is complete. Tracking tags: risk, quality.
